---
title: "Concept Name"
description: "🌱One-line definition or framing"
date: 2026-01-01
date-modified: last-modified
categories: [IBD, scoring systems]
---

::: {.note-meta}
🌱 Seedling · Last tended April 2026
:::

<!-- Maturity options: 🌱 Seedling / 🌿 Sprout / 🌳 Evergreen -->

## In plain terms

Explain the concept as if to a smart colleague outside your subfield. No jargon without definition. This section is the reason someone lands on this page from a search engine.

## How it works

The technical detail. Use equations if they help:

$$
\text{Score} = \sum_{i=1}^{n} w_i \cdot s_i
$$

Or code if the concept is algorithmic:

```python
# Example implementation
def compute_score(segments, weights):
    return sum(w * s for w, s in zip(weights, segments))
```

## Why it matters

Clinical relevance, research implications, or why you keep coming back to this idea.

## Open questions

Things you haven't resolved yet. Honest uncertainty makes garden notes more useful than polished ones.

- Question 1
- Question 2

## Related

- [Link to related concept](/notes/concepts/other.qmd)
- [Link to a project that uses this](/projects/project-name/index.qmd)
- [Link to a paper note](/notes/papers/author-year.qmd)

::: {.backlinks}
### Linked from
- [Page that links here](/path/to/page.qmd)
:::
